memberdef.name: XDMAPS_FSM_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x030 /* DMA Fault Status DMA Manager * Register */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_FSC_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x034 /* DMA Fault Status DMA Channel Register */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_FTM_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x038 /* DMA Fault Type DMA Manager Register */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_FTC0_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x040 /* DMA Fault Type for DMA Channel 0 */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_CPC0_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x104 /* Channel Program Counter for DMA * Channel 0 */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_SA_0_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x400 /* Source Address Register for DMA * Channel 0 */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_DA_0_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x404 /* Destination Address Register for * DMA Channel 0 */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_CC_0_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 0x408 /* Channel Control Register for * DMA Channel 0 */

memberdef.name: XDMAPS_CS_ACTIVE_MASK
memberdef.initializer: 0x07 /* channel status active mask, * llast 3 bits of CS register */

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the base address of the device.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XDmaPs_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)

briefdescription.para: This function perform the reset sequence to the given dmaps interface by configuring the appropriate control bits in the dmaps specific registers the dmaps reset sequence involves the following steps Disable all the interuupts Clear the pending interrupts Kill all the active channel threads Kill the manager thread.

simplesect.para: This function will not modify the slcr registers that are relevant for dmaps controller
